positive: A stylized, modern illustration of a glowing lunar moth silhouette with delicate, bioluminescent wing patterns. The moth is centered and poised against a minimalist, deep midnight blue and cosmic violet background. Incorporate subtle gradient wash effects and stylized nebula dust trails surrounding the wings. The overall aesthetic should be clean vector line art merged with watercolor luminescence, emphasizing high contrast between the black silhouette and the glowing core. Flat lay composition, suitable for apparel print repeat, high detail, crisp lines, central subject.
negative: blur, artifact, lowres, text, watermark, logo, copyright, sloppy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, grain, noisy
